_comment: Copy this file to media.config.json and set mediaRoot to YOUR machine's absolute path. media.config.json is gitignored because the path differs per person. The media root holds all video bytes in four lifecycle folders: raw/ (originals, never modified), derived/ (regenerable: proxies, frames, shots), work/ (throwaway draft renders), finals/ (approved deliverables). Also symlink the repo-root media folder to this same path so footage is browsable in the editor: ln -s "<this mediaRoot path>" media (terminal ln -s only, never Finder's Make Alias; the symlink is gitignored).
